title: Back to School: Transform Your Ideas into Art with Illustrate Ai!
description:
Embrace the back-to-school spirit with a twist this year!
Join me as I guide you through transforming your academic ideas into stunning visuals using Illustrate Ai from DesignBundles. 
Dive deep into the artistry of the season and elevate your design game.
Let's kick off this academic year with creativity and flair.

 You'll also get 40 creative prompts to inspire your own designs. The prompts also work with Stable Diffusion SDXL 1.0

#designbundles #pixaroma #aiart
transcript: Welcome back to a new video. Today, I'll be discussing the Back to School time.  I'll also show you how to create illustrations for this season using Illustrate AI from design bundles.  Back to school refers to the period when students and educators return to their schools or campuses after a summer break.  It's a time marked by the purchase of new school supplies, clothing, and other items necessary for the academic year.  Here is a list of Back to School ideas that you can use to generate illustrations for the upcoming academic season.  Additionally, I have compiled another list filled with even more creative ideas for you to explore.  On the left side of the screen, you can see the art style I've utilized as well as the prompt I used.  Meanwhile, on the right side, you'll find the image that was generated using Illustrate AI from design bundles.
